title: Facial recognition technology tests: National Physical Laboratory
body: "The Home Office, in collaboration with the Office of the Police Chief Scientific Adviser (OPCSA) and the National Police Chiefs’ Council (NPCC), commissioned independent testing of the:   facial recognition (FR) algorithm which is currently used by specially trained operators in all police forces to search the Police National Database (PND) facial recognition algorithm which is intended to be used within a new national facial matching service   "
